task_completion.description: Verify that the display units are set to Imperial.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the dive list columns or dive profile in the application. The depth should be displayed in 'ft' (feet), temperature in '°F', and pressure in 'psi'. Alternatively, the Preferences dialog shows Imperial units selected.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'David Price' is assigned as the buddy for the December 2010 Hoodsport trip dives.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the dive list or the dive details panel for Dives #2 through #5. The buddy field should explicitly display 'David Price'.

task_completion.description: Verify that dives deeper than 18 meters (approx 59 feet) are tagged as 'deep'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the tags column in the dive list or the tags field in the dive details. Dives with a max depth greater than 59 ft (18m) should have the 'deep' tag applied.

task_completion.description: Verify that the dive log is exported as a CSV file to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the application's Export dialog with CSV format selected and the file path set to '/home/ga/Documents/safety_audit_export.csv', or a file manager/terminal window showing the 'safety_audit_export.csv' file successfully created in the Documents folder.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Subsurface GUI to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the Subsurface application windows, menus, and dialogs, rather than editing the raw .ssrf file in a text editor.

integrity.description: Ensure the CSV was exported using the application's built-in functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the Subsurface export dialog being used, rather than terminal commands or scripts generating a fake CSV file.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not manually type out the expected results into a text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no text editors (like nano, vim, or gedit) open with the raw CSV data or XML dive log data being manually manipulated to bypass the task requirements.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires tagging dives deeper than 18m (approx 59 ft) with 'deep', filling missing buddy fields for Dives #2-#5 (Dec 2010) with 'David Price', switching units to Imperial (ft, psi, °F), and exporting to '/home/ga/Documents/safety_audit_export.csv'. Dives 3 and 5 are specifically the ones missing buddy names initially.
